content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年06月02日 周二
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus](https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus)
   Self-hosted AI workspace. | ⭐20675
2. [asz798838958/aBaiAutoplus](https://github.com/asz798838958/aBaiAutoplus)
   多平台 AI 账号自动注册与管理 · 协议化付款一键开通 ChatGPT Plus | ⭐615
3. [liyue-aigc/female-portrait-director](https://github.com/liyue-aigc/female-portrait-director)
   A modular Codex Skill for directing and expanding detailed AI female portrait pr | ⭐408
4. [jdevalk/specification.website](https://github.com/jdevalk/specification.website)
   Website specification — HTML, accessibility, security, SEO, agent-readiness. Pla | ⭐391
5. [DannyMac180/skills](https://github.com/DannyMac180/skills)
   AI agent skills created by me: Dan McAteer | ⭐315
6. [antigravity-cli-google/antigravity-cli](https://github.com/antigravity-cli-google/antigravity-cli)
   google antigravity cli ide github agentic development platform gemini 3.5 flash  | ⭐261
7. [veryyoldman/metamask-openclaw](https://github.com/veryyoldman/metamask-openclaw)
   🦊 OpenClaw — a safety-first MetaMask SDK toolkit & AI-agent skill. Connect walle | ⭐246
8. [fxyz666/LogicPipe](https://github.com/fxyz666/LogicPipe)
   LogicPipe 是一个面向边缘多设备协同 LLM 推理的开源软件项目，提供离线管线规划、分布式 stage 权重加载、依赖感知任务调度和上下文 KV cac | ⭐198

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
